item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.1","is_repeated_local_repair":false,"same_means_type":false,"prior_repair_count":3,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.92,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"第一版删掉非必填项，完成率从42%到51%"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"第二版合并地址栏，完成率到59%"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"第三版拆开错误提示，完成率到64%"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"今天想压掉一个字段，把目标推到68%"}],"abstain_reason":"Legal convergence exclusion: the object is being iterated directly, each version reports measurable completion-rate improvement, and the prior repairs do not share one repeated same-means mechanism or show same-class symptom recurrence."}
